---
title: "Expressed sequence tag analysis of genes expressed in the bay scallop, *Argopecten irradians*"
type: "article"
author: "Roberts SB, Goetz FW"
year: "2003"
publication: "Biological Bulletin 205: 227-228"
preprint: ""
doi: "https://doi.org/10.2307/1543266"
materials: ""
eprint: ""
toc: FALSE
categories:
  - Other Invertebrates
  - Genomic Resources
---

## Citation

> Roberts SB, Goetz FW (2003) Expressed sequence tag analysis of genes expressed in the bay scallop, *Argopecten irradians*. Biological Bulletin 205: 227-228. 

## Abstract

*Abstract not available*
